pageContext.name: Imperial Patrol Trooper 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Rapid response Imperial Patrol Troopers™ are Stormtroopers trained for police duties in urban environments. Equipped with specialized gear, they would conduct their duties and patrol their beats, on C-PH Speeder Bikes™ in cities across the Empire™!   Forming part of our Faces of the Empire™ Collection, these 1oz pure silver coins follow the shape and color of the Imperial Patrol Trooper's helmet. The detailed design includes extra relief to give the coin additional interest. It arrives packaged inside a compact and modern Star Wars™-branded case, incorporating a large window – just perfect for display. A Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case along with the coin's unique number in the limited 10,000 mintage.   Move quickly for this rapid response Trooper!
